chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – Marriage of a child of adultery (bastard)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/57)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/57)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَلَدُ الزِّنَا يُنْكَحُ قَالَ نَعَمْ وَ لَا يُطْلَبُ وَلَدُهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, and a number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Abdullah Bin Sinan who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A (female) child of adultery (bastard), can be married?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, but do not seek her children’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad Ahmad ibn Muhammad from certain persons of our people from Sahl ibn Ziyad from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “This is concerning my question before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about marriage with one born out of wedlock. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, but her children are not wanted.’”
